items.mistake: Reaching for any to silence the compiler.
items.fix: Use precise types, or unknown plus narrowing for uncertain data.
items.why: any disables checking and lets bugs through unnoticed.

items.mistake: Assuming types validate runtime data like API responses.
items.fix: Validate at runtime (manual checks or a library like zod) since types are erased.
items.why: TypeScript can't enforce shapes on data that arrives at runtime.

items.mistake: Using string for fields with a fixed set of values.
items.why: Unions catch typos and document the allowed values.

items.mistake: Casting with 'as' to force a type that isn't actually true.
items.fix: Narrow with runtime checks instead of asserting blindly.
items.why: A wrong assertion hides a real mismatch until it crashes.
